title: Lebanese army says Israeli attacks violate ceasefire, urges caution in south
snippet: Lebanese army reports Israeli shelling violations hours after ceasefire begins. Machinegun and artillery fire at ambulance team in Kunin (Nabatieh). 1 killed in Kounine (motorcycle/vehicle struck). Israeli military warns residents to stay north of Litani River.
tag_reason: 레바논 휴전 발효 직후 이스라엘군 위반 사례는 휴전의 취약성을 보여주는 신규 전개
